content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：希洛EP·以血洗仇，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：希洛EP·以血洗仇
她生來的宿命中便充滿仇恨、殺伐與無盡的爭鬥。
當她拋棄一切溫軟的、溫暖的幻影，選擇拿起刀與槍時，命運的凱歌就已為她而奏響。
她注定成為一個戰士，用敵人的鮮血洗刷仇恨，而後度過或許並不光榮，卻無畏無悔的一生。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Helot EP: Bloodshed Revenge》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Helot EP: Bloodshed Revenge》 
Her destiny was full of hatred, killing and endless fighting.
When she abandoned all soft and warm illusions and chose to pick up the knife and gun, the triumphant song of fate had already sounded for her.
She was destined to become a warrior, wash away hatred with the blood of the enemy, and then live a life that may not be glorious, but fearless and without regrets.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：希洛EP·以血洗仇

content:
**01.為了不再失去的明天-For the Promised Tomorrow-**

大雪無盡落下，紛紛揚揚，將戰士的頭髮覆上霜白。
她一生的回憶於此時流淌，她從人心幽微之處走過，要去往群山磅礡之中。
背叛、拋棄與守護，一切痛苦與憤怒，不過是一場另一場戰鬥。與人、與山、與自我。
她看向自己的領導者，看向陌生又熟悉的新同伴，露出了不熟練的笑容。
她或有一天會凱旋，或許會永遠倒在戰場，但即使升上天國或墮入地獄的那一刻，她也不會放下手中的利刃。
為了不再失去這一切，這次她選擇在復仇之前，舉起名為守護之劍，獨自前往她的戰場。
The snow fell endlessly, fluttering, covering the warrior's hair with frost.
The memories of her life flowed at this moment, she walked through the subtle places in people's hearts, and went to the majestic mountains.
Betrayal, abandonment and protection, all the pain and anger, are just one battle after another. With people, with mountains, and with herself.
She looked at her leader, at her strange and familiar new companions, and showed an unskilled smile.
She may triumph one day, or fall on the battlefield forever, but even at the moment of ascending to heaven or falling into hell, she will not put down the sharp blade in her hand.
In order not to lose all this again, this time she chose to raise the sword called protection before revenge, and rush to her battlefield alone.
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：希洛EP·以血洗仇

content:
**02.向群山發問-Question the Mountains-**

那是她宿命的戰鬥，那是她必須前往的戰場。
她將所有懦弱、猶豫、恐懼都隨過往拋卻。
她並不後悔，只因她已明白此生戰鬥的真諦。
她並不孤獨，那手中的劍刃倒映的，正是另一個自己張狂的面龐。
That was her fateful battle, that was the battlefield she had to go to.
She threw away all her cowardice, hesitation, and fear with the past.
She did not regret it, just because she had understood the true meaning of fighting in this life.
She was not alone, and the blade in her hand reflected the arrogant face of another self.
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：希洛EP·以血洗仇
